Continued unit test coverage for SPESTG-480 DIA exception scenarios.

Added additional unit tests for DIA ingestion file-selection and orchestrator guard paths. Current coverage includes Dataverse staging retry behavior, notification service logging, file-selection scenarios, null payload guard, and missing filename guard.

Validation completed:
- Test Explorer: 11 passed, 0 failed, 0 skipped
- dotnet test: passing before latest checkpoints
- Changes committed and pushed to users/alex/SPESTG-480-dia-exception-handling

Remaining unit test work is focused on the deeper orchestrator exception paths, including invalid encrypted file format, decryption failure, invalid decrypted output, and staging retry-exhaustion notification. These require Blob download mocking, so I will continue them in the next focused block.
